math_recheck: Re-derived every load-bearing eq against the original PRL(1979)/PRB(1980): gap E_g=4t1=8au, Delta=4au0=2t1, E_k=sqrt(eps^2+Delta^2), E_0(u) elliptic (3.16c) + small-z expansion E(1-z^2)=1+1/2(ln(4/|z|)-1/2)z^2 (verified numerically, Peierls maximum correct), rho_0(E) (3.20), Green-determinant DeltaE (4.6), midgap recursion (4.19-4.22) -> phi0=(1/l)sech(n/l)cos(pi n/2), charge-conservation/local-sum-rule (4.15-4.18), (Q,s)=(0,1/2),(+-e,0) (4.16), mass M_s=4u0^2 M/(3 l a^2) (Eq 7), int sech^4=4/3 (verified), doping E_s<Delta.
